\tzpentry{ID3788}{Phase Field}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3788 introduces Phase Field as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \dot{\phi}_i = \Omega_i + \sum_{j=1}^{N} K_{ij}\,\sin\!\big(\phi_j - \phi_i\big), \qquad i=1,\dots,N, \label{eq:kuramoto_planetary} \end{equation}
